# Hooks

| Hook | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| [useBankForm](use-bank-form.md) | Headless React Hook Form hook for creating an employee bank account. |
| [useChildSupportGarnishmentForm](use-child-support-garnishment-form.md) | Headless hook for creating or updating a child-support garnishment. |
| [useCompensationForm](use-compensation-form.md) | Headless hook for creating or updating a compensation row on a job — FLSA classification, pay rate, payment unit, effective date, and optional minimum-wage adjustment. |
| [useDeductionForm](use-deduction-form.md) | Headless hook for creating or updating a non-child-support deduction. |
| [useEmployeeDetailsForm](use-employee-details-form.md) | Headless hook for creating or updating an employee's profile details — name, email, SSN, date of birth, and self-onboarding preference. |
| [useEmployeeList](use-employee-list.md) | Fetches a paginated list of a company's employees and decorates each entry with the actions allowed for its current onboarding state. |
| [useEmployeeStateTaxesForm](use-employee-state-taxes-form.md) | Headless form hook for updating an employee's state tax withholding answers. The set of questions is driven by the API response per state, so `form.Fields` is an array of state groups with discriminated, render-ready `Field` components rather than a fixed named object. |
| [useFederalTaxesForm](use-federal-taxes-form.md) | Headless hook for updating an employee's federal tax (W-4) withholding information — filing status, multiple-jobs flag, dependents, other income, deductions, and extra withholding. |
| [useHomeAddressForm](use-home-address-form.md) | Form hook for creating or editing an employee's home address. |
| [useJobForm](use-job-form.md) | Headless hook for creating or updating an employee's job — title, hire date, S-Corp 2% shareholder flag, and Washington state workers' compensation fields. |
| [usePaymentMethodForm](use-payment-method-form.md) | Headless React Hook Form hook for updating an employee's payment method. |
| [useSignEmployeeForm](use-sign-employee-form.md) | Headless hook for signing an employee form — captures a typed signature, electronic consent, and (for I-9 forms) preparer/translator certification. |
| [useSplitPaymentsForm](use-split-payments-form.md) | Headless React Hook Form hook for splitting an employee's Direct Deposit across multiple bank accounts. |
| [useWorkAddressForm](use-work-address-form.md) | Form hook for creating or editing an employee's work address. |
